name: Sunrun Inc.
description: Sunrun Inc. is a leading home solar, battery storage, and energy services company in the United States. Founded in 2007, the company pioneered the solar-as-a-service model, making clean energy more accessible to homeowners without high upfront costs. Sunrun provides end-to-end residential solar solutions, including design, installation, financing, and long-term maintenance. Through its innovative battery storage systems and grid services, Sunrun helps customers increase energy independence, lower electricity bills, and contribute to a more resilient and sustainable power grid.
